title: Wrong code with BLKANDNBLK, reg assigned by both block and non-block statements

features.name: register bits assigned by mixed blocking and non-blocking assignments
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit register where different bits are assigned using both blocking assignments in a combinational always block and non-blocking assignments in a sequential always block

features.name: same register driven by combinational and sequential always blocks
features.description: Code should include a register variable that is assigned in both a combinational always block and a sequential always block, where the combinational logic feeds into the sequential logic

features.name: non-blocking assignment to reg fed from blocking assignment in different always block
features.description: Code should include a register bit assigned via non-blocking statement in a sequential block where the source value originates from a blocking assignment in a combinational block
